summary.finance: Kospi surged 8.4% on optimism over potential Iran war resolution; March export data hit all-time high.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 opens today at BEXCO with 136 galleries. Seo-Seoul Museum of Art hosts 'SeMA Performance'.

market_highlights: Kospi rebounded 8.4% on April 1, fueled by optimism over potential Iran war resolution.
March exports soared 48.3% YoY, driven by strong semiconductor and AI hardware shipments.
Sidecar circuit breaker triggered on KOSPI and KOSDAQ following rapid gains.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 opens today at BEXCO (until April 5) with 136 galleries.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art presents 'SeMA Performance' through April 12.
